name: External Control of System or Configuration Setting
description: The product allows externally-controlled input to specify or influence system settings or configuration values, enabling attackers to disrupt service or cause the application to behave in unexpected and potentially malicious ways.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that flows directly to META[system_config] or TRANSFORM[config_setting] nodes that modify system behavior (connection strings, log paths, feature flags, host addresses) without a CONTROL[validation|allowlist] node restricting the configurable values
